title: 隨機方塊空島生存
description:
隨機方塊空島生存，支持中英文，空島隨著時間刷新方塊，利用空島刷新的方塊想辦法破關吧!

Random Block Floating Island Survival, supports Chinese and English. The floating island refreshes blocks over time. Use the refreshed blocks to find a way to clear the level!
body:
# 中文介紹

隨機方塊空島，玩家將會出生在一個6*3*3的空島上，隨著時間變化，你腳下的方塊將會隨機變換

需要透過指令來開始遊戲，也可以透過指令來調整方塊刷新時間，預設為30秒

更新時間看心情，有空的話會持續更新其他版本的

目前只支持1.20.1，應該支持所有模組的方塊，有bug歡迎到dc留言給我

如果有違反任何規定請聯絡我

# English Introduction

Random Block Floating Island: Players will spawn on a 6x3x3 floating island. Over time, the blocks beneath your feet will randomly change.

You need to use commands to start the game, and you can also use commands to adjust the block refresh time, which is set to 30 seconds by default.

Update frequency depends on my mood; I will continue to update other versions if I have time.

Currently only supports 1.20.1; should support blocks from all mods. If you encounter any bugs, please leave a message on Discord.

If there are any violations of the rules, please contact me.
